name: NeTab
description: A private-first Chrome new tab dashboard with grouped quick links, random media backgrounds, widgets, and an in-browser settings panel.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: http:; media-src 'self' data: blob: https: http:; frame-src https://widgets.dastyar.io; connect-src 'self' data: blob: https: http:;
